nasb.text: The Lord is slow to anger and great in power, And the Lord will by no means leave the guilty unpunished. In whirlwind and storm is His way, And clouds are the dust beneath His feet.

esv.text: The Lord is slow to anger and great in power, and the Lord will by no means clear the guilty. His way is in whirlwind and storm, and the clouds are the dust of his feet.

cnv.text: 耶和華不輕易發怒，可是大有能力； 他絕不以有罪的為無罪。 耶和華乘著狂風暴雨而來， 雲彩是他腳下的塵土。

ccb.text: 耶和华不轻易发怒，有伟大的能力。 耶和华断不以有罪的为无罪。 祂行走在旋风和暴风中， 云彩是祂脚下的尘土。
